approach: Mandatory source-and-reproducibility baseline plus an independently checked audit of the forced perfect-matching quotient for any hypothetical 40-block cover

strategy.mechanism: Source verification, incidence double counting, exact matching enumeration, fixed-matching block classification, and a separately implemented bitmask replay

hypothesis: The maintained 40..41 status, published 41-block witness, and every arithmetic step forcing a unique excess perfect matching in a hypothetical 40-cover replay exactly under two materially different implementations.
discriminating_test: Enumerate all 924 candidate blocks and 495 targets, check the 41-block witness and a delete-one negative control, enumerate all perfect matchings, classify blocks by complete fixed pairs, then independently recompute every result using 12-bit masks and a matching recurrence.

search_efficiency.naive_space: binom(924,40) = 22043617793153091129533388844582057001295550372019052408588012868316124 labelled 40-block families; the bottleneck is certified global coverage/exclusion, not generating the 924 blocks.
reductions_considered: canonical augmentation under C2 wr S5
search_efficiency.chosen_mechanism: Prove and independently check the forced excess matching, fix one canonical matching, and split the fixed-matching family into the exhaustive r=0-present and no-r=0/r=1-present roots before any solver search.
search_efficiency.estimated_or_measured_savings: Exact 10,395-to-1 reduction in matching-indexed families; the 924 blocks split as 64, 480, 360, and 20 for r=0,1,2,3. No runtime speedup was measured in this baseline epoch.
search_efficiency.soundness_guard: The producer enumerates matchings and set incidences; the checker uses bitmasks, a dynamic matching recurrence, independent profile enumeration, and a failing delete-one witness control. All 47 repository unittests passed.

space_reduction.represented_space_before: 10,395 matching-indexed exact pair-multiplicity families forced by the six excess pairs
space_reduction.eliminated_or_quotiented: Relabel-equivalent choices of the unique multiplicity-10 perfect matching
space_reduction.represented_space_after: one canonical fixed-matching family, exhaustively split into two root families: r=0 present; or r=0 absent and r=1 present
space_reduction.reduction_factor: exactly 10,395 on the matching-family index; not claimed as a 10,395 reduction of all labelled block assignments
space_reduction.coverage_scope: all hypothetical 40-block C(12,6,4) covers, up to relabeling of the 12 points
space_reduction.soundness_basis: Every point has degree 20; every pair has multiplicity at least 9; the six total excess incidences give excess degree one at every point, hence a unique perfect matching. S12 is transitive on perfect matchings, and every feasible r-profile contains r=0 or, if not, r=1.
space_reduction.remaining_unknown: Whether either fixed-matching root contains a 40-block cover; no global search or exclusion was run.
space_reduction.next_bulk_elimination: After proof-checker restoration, use point-link canonical augmentation under C2 wr S5 and a matched sequential-counter versus kmtotalizer discriminator.

tactical_learning.prediction: Both independent implementations will reproduce 924 candidates, 495 targets, a valid 41-cover, 10,395 matchings, and fixed-matching r-class counts [64,480,360,20].
tactical_learning.observation: Every predicted value matched; deleting the first published block left 485/495 targets covered, so the negative control failed as intended. The current checkout unexpectedly lacked a DRAT-trim executable/source.
tactical_learning.surprise: The mathematical baseline matched prediction; the proof-replay toolchain recorded by older Mac pilot receipts is not portable to this checkout.
tactical_learning.failure_signature: A hash-bound solver receipt can remain non-replayable on a new host when its pinned checker binary/source was never promoted into the problem workspace.
tactical_learning.bottleneck_update: Before testing the 47-node inherited link frontier, restore and control-test a pinned project-scoped proof checker; after that, propagation strength of the cardinality encoding is the main measured uncertainty.

reusable_assets.name: baseline invariant producer
reusable_assets.use: rebuild all forced-matching arithmetic and positive/negative controls

reusable_assets.name: independent bitmask checker
reusable_assets.use: fail-closed replay without sharing the producer's set representation or matching enumerator

reusable_assets.name: source and method audit
reusable_assets.use: status, historical methods, tooling, searches, and acceptance path

constraints_learned.constraint: Every hypothetical 40-cover has point degree 20 at all 12 points.
constraints_learned.evidence: C(11,5,3)=20 plus 40*6=240, replayed in baseline result/checker

constraints_learned.constraint: Pair multiplicities are 10 on a perfect matching and 9 on the other 60 pairs.
Relative to the fixed matching, all 40-block profiles satisfy n0+n1+n2+n3=40 and n1+2n2+3n3=60, hence n0>0 or n1>0.
constraints_learned.evidence: 221 feasible profiles exhaustively enumerated by both implementations

tactical_learning.next_discriminator: Restore official pinned DRAT-trim, replay one small known UNSAT control and one existing leaf receipt, then dry-build/audit sequential and kmtotalizer link constraints before any matched solver tranche.

prior_art_check.exact_delta: No new covering bound is claimed. The delta is a deterministic, independently checked baseline packet that binds the maintained witness to the exact perfect-matching and root-split reductions and records a proof-toolchain portability gap.
prior_art_check.duplicate_risk: The mathematical reductions are elementary and likely known to specialists or already implicit in internal pilots; presenting them as novel would be rediscovery.
prior_art_check.comparison_test: Compare exact status and witness against the maintained La Jolla page, the C(11,5,3) and C(10,4,2) dependency pages, and recompute every invariant independently.

field_progress_assessment.gate_id: Use the sourced contribution and verification contract.
field_progress_assessment.closest_prior_result: maintained 40 <= C(12,6,4) <= 41 with a 41-block simulated-annealing cover
field_progress_assessment.measurable_improvement: none to the covering-number bound; exact 10,395-fold matching-family quotient and two-root coverage were independently replayed as infrastructure
field_progress_assessment.independent_validation: checkers/verify_baseline_invariants.py passed all checks; repository unittest discovery passed 47/47 tests
field_progress_assessment.external_audience: Covering Repository maintainers for a future exact result; this baseline alone is not submission-worthy
field_progress_assessment.remains_unproved: existence or nonexistence of a 40-block cover
field_progress_assessment.route_recommendation: redirect to the proof-toolchain gate, then continue only with the predeclared matched cardinality-encoding discriminator because deeper unchanged branching and the prior incremental wrapper lack a positive signal

lab_review.reason: Segment 1 hash-binds the 41-block witness, passed the exact all-495-target check, wrote a valid 1/2 checkpoint, exceeded the throughput floor, stayed below artifact-growth limits, and predeclared segment 2 as the final lifecycle test.
evidence: lab stdout reports 41 blocks, 495 covered targets, complete=false, completed_units=1/2

summary: The mandatory baseline is complete. The designated current source still reports 40 <= C(12,6,4) <= 41; the preserved 41-block witness covers all 495 four-subsets. A deterministic producer and materially different bitmask checker established the exact forced perfect-matching quotient and two-root split for any hypothetical 40-cover. No frontier search was run and the exact value remains open. The audit also found that this checkout lacks DRAT-trim, so historical Mac proof receipts cannot yet be freshly replayed here.
rationale: Outcome is progress, not candidate: the epoch produced reproducible source, script, checker, result, negative control, tests, method map, acceptance path, and continuation gate, but neither a 40-block witness nor a complete UNSAT certificate. The maintained status is supported by the [La Jolla Covering Repository](https://ljcr.dmgordon.org/cover/show_cover.php?v=12&k=6&t=4), while the successor [Covering Repository](https://www.coveringrepository.com/) provides the credible external reporting channel.
claims: The preserved 41-block source witness contains 41 distinct 6-subsets and covers all 495 4-subsets of a 12-set.
Conditional on a 40-block cover existing, every point degree is 20 and the multiplicity-10 pairs form a perfect matching; every other pair has multiplicity 9.
There are exactly 10,395 perfect matchings on 12 labelled points and the stabilizer of a fixed matching has order 46,080.
For a fixed matching the 924 blocks have r-class counts [64,480,360,20], and the r=0-present/no-r=0-r=1-present split covers every feasible 40-block profile.
No exact-value improvement or novelty claim is made.
evidence: .venv/bin/python -m unittest discover -s tests -p test_*.py -v passed 47/47 tests in the recorded regression experiment
source receipt binds the maintained 41-block witness at sha256 395bc870e7eb9e84a472873db97de553afc34afdb666545824944e89047913e5
next_steps: Restore DRAT-trim from its official source at a pinned revision inside the problem workspace; record source, binary, and build hashes.
Replay a small known UNSAT control and one existing leaf proof; stop on any semantic, hash, or verdict mismatch.
Build sequential-counter and kmtotalizer versions of the same 11 link-degree equalities and add a structurally independent totalizer auditor plus non-cardinality clause diff.
Only after those gates, run the predeclared 20-leaf cold matched discriminator; promote only at 8/20 replayed closures with acceptable proof growth.
experiments: .proof-experiments/20260722-130405-e8f38c: baseline invariant audit passed producer and independent checker; 924 candidates, 495 targets, valid 41-cover, delete-one control uncovered 10 targets, 10,395 matchings, r-counts [64,480,360,20]
.proof-experiments/20260722-130801-6879ad: all 47 repository unittest cases passed in 15.63 seconds
independent_checker: checkers/verify_baseline_invariants.py uses 12-bit subset masks, a dynamic perfect-matching recurrence, and independent profile enumeration rather than the producer's tuple/set incidence and recursive matching enumeration.

established_facts.claim: The preserved 41-block witness covers all 495 four-subsets.
established_facts.evidence: producer and independent bitmask checker; witness sha256 395bc870e7eb9e84a472873db97de553afc34afdb666545824944e89047913e5
established_facts.scope: the exact block list in sources/ljcr-c1264-41.txt

established_facts.claim: Any 40-block C(12,6,4) cover has point degrees all 20 and pair multiplicities 10 on a perfect matching and 9 elsewhere.
established_facts.evidence: double counting from maintained C(11,5,3)=20 and C(10,4,2)=9; independently replayed arithmetic
established_facts.scope: conditional on existence of a 40-block cover

established_facts.claim: The fixed-matching r classes contain 64, 480, 360, and 20 blocks, and the two root cases cover all 221 feasible r-profiles.
established_facts.evidence: complete enumeration in producer and independent bitmask checker
established_facts.scope: all 924 six-subsets relative to the canonical matching and all nonnegative profiles satisfying the two incidence equations

ruled_out.claim_or_route: Scale shallow depth-7 direct cubing unchanged under the prior 10-second leaf policy.
ruled_out.scope: the pre-existing deterministic 64+64 sampled cubes across the two fixed-matching root CNFs
ruled_out.reason: Only 10/128 leaves closed provisionally, 7.8125%, below the declared continuation threshold, and no leaf proofs were preserved/replayed in that sample.
ruled_out.evidence: artifacts/pilot/sample-r0-audit.json and sample-r1-audit.json with four hash-bound results.jsonl inputs
ruled_out.reopen_condition: A materially stronger branching/encoding mechanism with a predeclared matched sample and replayed proofs.

ruled_out.claim_or_route: Scale the prior Glucose4 incremental-assumption wrapper unchanged.
ruled_out.scope: ten selected inherited hard-tail leaves under the recorded best-effort 1,000-conflict policy
ruled_out.reason: Both cold and incremental modes closed 0/10, resource work was not matched, and the wrapper could overshoot limits; this is not evidence against incremental solving in general.
ruled_out.reopen_condition: A reliably interruptible backend and resource-matched cold/incremental protocol with exact parent-plus-assumption equivalence.

open_leads.description: Restore a portable proof-replay toolchain before any UNSAT-producing frontier work.
open_leads.rationale: It is the cheapest fail-closed test and prevents solver-to-CNF receipts from becoming non-reproducible on this host.
open_leads.next_experiment: Pin official DRAT-trim source, build locally, hash it, and replay one small known proof plus one existing leaf receipt.

open_leads.description: Matched kmtotalizer versus sequential-counter discriminator on inherited open link leaves.
open_leads.rationale: It changes the propagation/encoding mechanism while retaining the strongest verified symmetry decomposition; PySAT officially exposes both encodings.
open_leads.next_experiment: After the toolchain gate, dry-build both forms, independently audit totalizer structure and identical non-cardinality clauses, then run the deterministic 20-leaf paired tranche.

open_leads.description: Positive search specialized to the forced matching and exact pair degrees.
open_leads.rationale: A 40-block witness has a compact acceptance certificate and may be cheaper than a global negative proof.
open_leads.next_experiment: Design a deterministic multi-seed local-search pilot whose moves preserve 40 blocks and score uncovered four-sets plus pair-degree violations; compare with unconstrained set-cover local search on a small fixed budget.

blocker: No 40-block witness is known and no exhaustive negative certificate exists. Practically, this checkout also lacks the pinned DRAT checker needed to reproduce UNSAT leaves before testing the inherited 47-node link frontier.
reopen_condition: Reopen this completed baseline only if the maintained status changes, a cited source contradicts an invariant, or the independent checker disagrees after an environment change.

continuation.objective: Make proof replay portable, then determine whether kmtotalizer materially increases replayed closure on the inherited link frontier.
continuation.first_action: Acquire the official DRAT-trim source at a pinned revision into a project-scoped toolchain and run checkers/replay_drat.py on a small known UNSAT CNF/proof pair.
continuation.stop_condition: Stop or redirect if toolchain hashes/verdicts disagree, cardinality/non-cardinality audits fail, the matched encoding tranche closes fewer than 8/20 leaves, or proof growth projects above 30 GB.

campaign_assessment.reason: The one-bit target and exact symmetry quotient remain attractive, but frontier compute should wait for a portable proof checker and a successful bounded encoding discriminator.

strategy_proposals.mechanism: Replace only the 11 link-degree sequential counters with kmtotalizer while byte-comparing every other clause and replaying cold CaDiCaL proofs.
strategy_proposals.hypothesis: kmtotalizer closes at least 8 of 20 deterministically selected open link leaves within 10 seconds each, with replayable proof growth below 30 GB projected total.
strategy_proposals.discriminating_test: Paired cold 20-leaf benchmark after a structural totalizer audit and proof-toolchain control.
strategy_proposals.rationale: It changes propagation and approximately halves auxiliary-variable burden in the advisory dry-build, without changing the verified decomposition; the dry-build claim still requires Sol-side reproduction.

strategy_proposals.mechanism: Search only 40-block families under the fixed matching, using swaps biased toward maintaining exact point/pair multiplicities and bitset delta scores for uncovered four-sets.
strategy_proposals.hypothesis: Constraint-preserving moves reach strictly fewer uncovered four-sets than an unconstrained 40-block local-search control over the same deterministic seed budget.
strategy_proposals.discriminating_test: Twenty fixed seeds at a short equal move budget; direct checker validates any zero-defect witness.
strategy_proposals.rationale: A positive result needs only a compact block list, whereas an UNSAT campaign requires complete proof coverage.

synthesis_candidates.mechanism: Keep the perfect-matching and C2 wr S5 canonical link decomposition, catalog blockers, and residual checker, but substitute a structurally audited kmtotalizer only for exact link degrees.
synthesis_candidates.transfer_hypothesis: The hard tail is limited more by sequential-counter propagation/auxiliary structure than by the link decomposition itself, so changing only cardinality encoding should alter closure rates while preserving exact case coverage.
synthesis_candidates.discriminating_test: Independent dry-build equivalence audit followed by 20 matched cold leaves with replayed UNSAT proofs.
synthesis_candidates.falsification_signal: Any semantic mismatch, fewer than 8/20 replayed closures, or unacceptable proof growth.
synthesis_candidates.rationale: This combines a verified domain reduction with a different CNF information mechanism; it is not deeper branching under a renamed route.

candidate_profile.scholarly_question: What is the exact value of C(12,6,4), currently maintained between 40 and 41?
candidate_profile.meaningful_delta: No mathematical bound delta; independently reproducible baseline and symmetry-reduction packet only.
candidate_profile.acceptance_test: For a terminal positive result, 40 distinct 6-subsets must cover all 495 4-subsets; for a terminal negative result, every symmetry-reduced leaf needs independently checked coverage and replayable proof logs.

closest_prior_work.difference: The source supplies the maintained range and 41-cover; this epoch adds no better bound.
Historical simulated annealing constructs upper bounds; this epoch audits the exact finite baseline and a negative-search symmetry quotient.

novelty_searches.finding: No exact-value settlement located; this bounded search is not proof of novelty.
Current frozen dataset identified; exact JSON entry was not extracted in the network-restricted workspace.
No stable local prior-art method ID exists; this is a registry gap rather than novelty evidence.

external_channel.acceptance_path: Submit a checked 40-block witness directly, or first obtain independent specialist validation of a complete public UNSAT certificate and then report the exact result.

tool_disclosure: GPT-5.6 Sol principal performed source synthesis, experiment design, code review, and interpretation. A pre-existing gpt-5.6-terra experiment-verification memo was treated only as advisory and not as independent evidence. Deterministic work used Python 3.12.3 standard library, python-sat 1.9.dev7 only in inherited tests/artifacts, the repository's 47-test unittest suite, and web search/open for primary-source auditing. System CaDiCaL 1.7.3 was version/hash inspected but not used to solve this epoch; DRAT-trim was not present and no proof assistant, CAS, SAT frontier search, or external human validator was used.
